data.title: n8n Automation: New AI Features & 400+ Integrations (2024)
data.excerpt: Discover n8n's latest AI-powered workflow builder, 400+ integrations, and affordable pricing. Build complex automations without code—try it free today.

$media.alt: n8n Automation: New AI Features & 400+ Integrations (2024)

children.text: If you've been searching for an automation platform that gives you real power without locking you into a proprietary black box, n8n deserves your full attention. I've spent weeks testing every corner of this platform, and the recent updates genuinely change what's possible for solo builders, small teams, and growing companies alike.

n8n is an open-source automation platform with over 400 integrations and native AI nodes that let you build complex workflows without writing code. Think of it as the Swiss Army knife of automation—except the blades keep getting sharper with every release.
This post covers what's new, why it matters, and exactly who should be using n8n right now. Let's get into it.
What Is n8n and Why Is Everyone Talking About It?
If you're new to the platform,
here's a solid overview of what n8n actually is
. But in short: n8n is a workflow automation tool that connects your apps, databases, APIs, and AI models into automated sequences you design visually. You drag, drop, connect, and deploy.
What makes n8n different from the dozens of other automation tools out there? Three things:
It's open-source.
You can self-host it on your own infrastructure, audit the code, and customize it to your heart's content. No vendor lock-in.
It has 400+ integrations.
From Google Sheets and Slack to PostgreSQL, Airtable, Stripe, and specialized APIs—n8n talks to almost everything.
It has native AI nodes.
You can plug LLMs directly into your workflows, build RAG pipelines, and create AI agents without touching a single line of Python.

I started using n8n expecting a Zapier alternative. What I found was something far more flexible. The learning curve is gentle for simple automations, but the ceiling is incredibly high. You can build things in n8n that would require custom scripts or full engineering teams elsewhere.
Start building your first workflow on n8n for free
—no credit card required.
New and Highlighted Features in 2024
n8n's development pace is impressive. The team ships updates frequently, and the community actively contributes nodes and improvements. Here are the features that stand out right now.
AI Workflow Builder

This is the headline feature, and it delivers. n8n's AI Workflow Builder lets you describe what you want in plain English, and the platform generates a working workflow for you. You get credits included with every plan—50 on Starter, 150 on Pro.

I tested this by typing: "When a new row is added to my Google Sheet, send a Slack message to the marketing channel with the customer name and issue summary." The AI Builder generated the entire workflow, connected the right nodes, and even suggested error handling. I tweaked two fields and hit activate. It ran perfectly.
This feature alone saves hours of setup time, especially for people who know what they want but aren't sure how to wire it together visually.
400+ Integrations and Growing
n8n's integration library now exceeds 400 nodes. Recent additions include deeper connections with:
AI services:
OpenAI, Hugging Face, LangChain, local LLMs via Ollama
Databases:
Supabase, PlanetScale, MongoDB Atlas
Marketing tools:
HubSpot, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign
Developer tools:
GitHub, GitLab, Sentry, Linear
Communication:
Slack, Discord, Telegram, Microsoft Teams

Each integration is a node you drag into your canvas. You authenticate once, and then you can use that service in unlimited workflows. The community also maintains a growing library of custom nodes you can install with a single click.
Sub-Workflows and Modular Design

One feature I genuinely love: you can call workflows from within other workflows. This modular approach means you build reusable components—like a "send notification" workflow or a "log to database" workflow—and reference them anywhere.

This makes complex automations manageable. Instead of one 50-node monster workflow, you create clean, testable pieces that compose together. It's how software engineers think, and n8n brings that mindset to no-code automation.
Enhanced Error Handling and Debugging

n8n now offers execution search, workflow history, and detailed error logs on the Pro plan and above. When a workflow fails, you can see exactly which node broke, inspect the data at that step, and fix the issue without re-running the entire flow.

For anyone running production automations, this is essential. I had a webhook workflow that intermittently failed due to a malformed payload from a third-party app. The execution log showed me the exact payload, I added a validation node, and the problem was solved in minutes.
Self-Hosting and Cloud Flexibility

n8n offers both cloud-hosted and self-hosted options. The Starter and Pro plans are hosted by n8n—zero maintenance on your end. The Business plan (for companies with under 100 employees) supports self-hosting, giving you full control over data, compliance, and infrastructure.
This dual model is rare. Most automation platforms force you into their cloud. n8n respects your choice.
If you want a deep walkthrough of setup and configuration,
this step-by-step n8n tutorial covers everything
How n8n's AI Capabilities Change Everything
Let's talk about AI, because this is where n8n pulls ahead of the pack.
The platform has dedicated AI nodes that let you:
Call LLMs directly:
Send prompts to OpenAI, Claude, or local models and use the responses in subsequent steps.
Build RAG pipelines:
Connect to vector databases, embed documents, and create retrieval-augmented generation systems entirely within n8n.
Create AI agents:
Use the Agent node to build autonomous workflows that reason, use tools, and take actions based on context.
Process documents:
Extract text from PDFs, analyze images, summarize emails—all powered by AI nodes wired into your automation.

Here's a real example from my setup: I built a workflow that monitors a customer support email inbox. When a new email arrives, n8n extracts the text, sends it to GPT-4 for sentiment analysis and categorization, creates a ticket in Linear with the appropriate priority, and posts a summary in Slack. If the sentiment is negative, it escalates to a team lead automatically.

That entire pipeline took me about 45 minutes to build. Six months ago, it would have required a custom Python script, a cron job, and ongoing maintenance. Now it runs reliably inside n8n, and I can see every execution in the log.
Explore n8n's AI features with a free trial
—the Starter plan includes 50 AI Workflow Builder credits to get you going.
For more inspiration on what's possible,
check out these n8n use cases across different industries
Who Is n8n Ideal For?
n8n isn't trying to be everything to everyone. But for certain people and teams, it's the best tool available. Here's who benefits most.
Solo Builders and Freelancers

If you're running a one-person operation—managing clients, sending invoices, posting content, tracking leads—n8n automates the repetitive work that eats your time. The Starter plan at $20/month gives you 2,500 workflow executions, which is more than enough for most solo workflows. You get unlimited users too, so you can invite a VA if needed.
Small Teams in Production

The Pro plan is built for small teams running automations that matter. At $50/month, you get 10,000 executions, 20 concurrent runs, 3 shared projects, and features like workflow history, execution search, and global variables. If your team depends on automation for daily operations, this plan delivers serious value.
Growing Companies Needing Scale

The Business plan supports companies with under 100 employees and offers 40,000 executions plus self-hosting. For teams that need compliance, data control, and collaboration across departments, this is where n8n shines. The self-hosted option means your data never leaves your infrastructure.
Developers Who Want a Visual Layer

Even if you can code, sometimes you don't want to. n8n lets developers build quickly using the visual editor while still offering code nodes for custom JavaScript or Python when you need them. It's the best of both worlds.
AI Builders and Experimenters

If you're exploring LLMs, building chatbots, or creating AI-powered tools, n8n is an incredible prototyping and production platform. The AI nodes are first-class citizens, not afterthoughts. You can iterate fast and deploy directly.
Not sure if n8n fits your workflow?
Here's why so many teams are choosing it
over alternatives.
n8n Pricing: Affordable Power at Every Level
Let's talk numbers, because n8n's pricing is refreshingly straightforward.
| Plan | Price | Executions | Key Highlights |
Starter
| $20/mo (billed annually) | 2,500 | 1 shared project, 5 concurrent, 50 AI credits, forum support |
Pro
| $50/mo (billed annually) | 10,000 | 3 shared projects, 20 concurrent, 150 AI credits, execution search, workflow history |
Business
| €667/mo (billed annually) | 40,000 | Self-hosted, full collaboration, enterprise features |
All plans include unlimited workflow steps and unlimited users. You pay for executions, not seats—which is a huge deal for teams.
The annual billing saves you 17%, and every plan starts with a free trial. No credit card required for Starter and Pro.
Compared to platforms that charge per task or per step, n8n's model is generous. A single execution can run through 20 nodes and still count as one execution. That's real value.
Tips for Getting the Most Out of n8n
After weeks of building and testing, here are my top recommendations:
Start with the AI Workflow Builder.
Describe your automation in plain English, let n8n generate the skeleton, then customize. It's the fastest path to a working workflow.
Use sub-workflows early.
Don't build monolithic flows. Create small, reusable workflows and compose them. Your future self will thank you.
Set up error handling from day one.
Add error trigger nodes to catch failures and notify yourself. It takes two minutes and saves hours of debugging later.
Explore the community nodes.
The n8n community has built integrations for services not yet in the official library. Browse, install, and contribute.
Test with manual executions first.
Before activating a workflow, run it manually with test data. Verify each node's output before letting it run automatically.
For more practical advice,
these n8n tips and best practices are worth bookmarking
My Verdict: n8n Is the Automation Platform to Beat
I've tested dozens of automation tools. Some are simpler. Some have fancier UIs. But none offer n8n's combination of openness, power, AI integration, and fair pricing.

The recent updates—especially the AI Workflow Builder, expanded integrations, and improved debugging—make this platform feel mature and ready for serious work. Whether you're automating a side project or running production workflows for a team of 50, n8n handles it.

The open-source foundation means you're never trapped. The cloud option means you don't have to manage servers if you don't want to. And the pricing means you can start small and scale without sticker shock.
Give n8n a try—start your free trial here
. No credit card, no commitment. Just build something and see for yourself.

children.text: Is n8n really free to use?

Yes. n8n is open-source and can be self-hosted completely free. The cloud plans (Starter, Pro, Business) offer hosted convenience with a free trial on Starter and Pro—no credit card required. Self-hosting gives you unlimited executions at zero software cost; you only pay for your own server.
How does n8n compare to Zapier or Make?

n8n stands out for three reasons: it's open-source (you can self-host and inspect the code), it includes native AI nodes for LLM integration and AI agents, and its pricing is execution-based rather than task-based. A single execution in n8n can run through dozens of nodes and still count as one. For builders who want deeper control and AI capabilities, n8n offers more flexibility.
Can I build AI-powered workflows in n8n without coding?

Absolutely. n8n has dedicated AI nodes for OpenAI, Hugging Face, LangChain, and local models. You can build RAG pipelines, sentiment analysis, document processing, and AI agents using the visual editor. The AI Workflow Builder even generates workflows from plain English descriptions, making it accessible to non-developers.
